title: The Silence of My Hands
overview: Rosa, the first deaf law student in Guadalajara, and Saira, an immigrant from California confronting her gender identity, try to stay together despite their realities and the distance between them. The Silence of My Hands, through a sensory journey spoken entirely in sign language, reveals the trust in their relationship and tests the adversities they face, immersing us in the silence of the last memories they share together.
